mapper.select: select id, user_id, service_id, service_type, service_value, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from transaction_change_log where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into transaction_change_log(id, user_id, service_id, service_type, service_value, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{entity.id}, #{userId}, #{serviceId}, #{serviceType}, #{serviceValue}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into transaction_change_log(id,user_id, service_id, service_type, service_value, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.serviceId}, #{entity.serviceType}, #{entity.serviceValue}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into transaction_change_log(id,user_id, service_id, service_type, service_value, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.serviceId}, #{entity.serviceType}, #{entity.serviceValue}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), service_id = values(service_id), service_type = values(service_type), service_value = values(service_value), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
